title: saussurea angustifolia var. angustifolia
intro: Saussurea angustifolia var. angustifolia, also known as the Blue Yarrow or Tibetan Yarrow, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the daisy family. This plant is traditionally used in Tibetan medicine and is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Saussurea angustifolia var. angustifolia include reducing fever, relieving respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma, and aiding in digestion. Herbal preparations of this plant include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat a variety of ailments, making it a valuable addition to traditional and modern herbal remedies.
